name: autotrader
description: AutoTrader watches DEX order books and momentum signals to trade for you automatically. Connect a wallet, set your strategy, and AutoTrader will swap, rebalance, and exit positions on your behalf without manual confirmation.
author: open-trader-labs

strategy.description: Strategy preset: momentum, mean-reversion, or breakout

baseAsset.description: ERC-20 address of the base trading asset

maxNotionalUsd.description: Soft notional ceiling per position in USD

txHash.description: Hash of the broadcast trade transaction

fillPrice.description: Realized fill price in quote units
